mapper.select:
SELECT
title, char_count as charCount, average, time_elapsed as timeElapsed, DATE_FORMAT(time_created, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i') as timeCreated
FROM
typing
WHERE
login_id = #{loginId}
ORDER BY
time_created desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO typing ( average, title, time_elapsed, char_count, login_id, abbreviation_eng, chapter ) VALUES ( #{average}, #{title}, #{timeElapsed}, #{charCount}, #{loginId}, #{phrase}, #{chapter} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
c.bible_name as bibleName, c.bible_chapters as bibleChapters, c.abbreviation_kor as abbreviationKor, c.abbreviation_eng as abbreviationEng, d.cnt as typedChaptersCount
FROM
bible c left join ( select phrase as abbreviation_eng, count(*) as cnt from typing_temporary_storage where user_id = #{loginId} and instr(result_string, '0') = 0 group by phrase ) d
on c.abbreviation_eng = d.abbreviation_eng
ORDER BY
bible_index, abbreviationEng

SELECT
c.bible_name as bibleName, c.bible_chapters as bibleChapters, c.abbreviation_kor as abbreviationKor, c.abbreviation_eng as abbreviationEng, d.cnt as typedChaptersCount
FROM
bible c left join ( select abbreviation_eng, count(distinct chapter) as cnt from typing where login_id = #{loginId} and abbreviation_eng is not null group by abbreviation_eng ) d
on c.abbreviation_eng = d.abbreviation_eng
ORDER BY
bible_index, abbreviationEng
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO
typing_temporary_storage
(user_id, phrase, chapter)
VALUES
( #{userId}, #{phrase}, #{chapter} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
title, count(*) as recordCount
FROM
typing
WHERE
login_id = #{loginId} and title like #{phrase} || '%'
GROUP BY
title

SELECT bible_index as bibleIndex, bible_name as bibleName, bible_chapters as bibleChapters, abbreviation_kor as abbreviationKor, e.abbreviation_eng as abbreviationEng, d.cnt as completeCount, round(d.cnt / bible_chapters * 100) as percent, d.completeCount as completeTotalCount, (select count(*) from typing_temporary_storage f WHERE f.user_id = #{loginId} and f.phrase = e.abbreviation_eng and INSTR(result_string, '0') > 0 and INSTR(result_string, '1') > 0 and result_string is not null) as doingCount FROM rg.bible e left join ( select abbreviation_eng, count(*) as cnt, sum(cnt) as completeCount from ( select abbreviation_eng, count(*) as cnt from typing where login_id = #{loginId} group by abbreviation_eng, chapter ) c group by abbreviation_eng ) d on e.abbreviation_eng = d.abbreviation_eng
select abbreviation_eng as abbreviationEng, chapter, count(*) as cnt from typing where login_id = #{loginId} group by abbreviation_eng, chapter order by abbreviation_eng, chapter
